global_description: A small, compact songbird with a sleek, rounded body. It features a striking contrast of deep blue and black plumage on the upper parts and a white belly. The bird has a distinctive black throat and face mask, with a short, pointed beak.

part_details.upperparts: Deep blue plumage covering the head, back, and wings.
part_details.throat: Black, forming a distinct mask-like pattern.
part_details.belly: White, contrasting sharply with the darker upperparts.
part_details.wings: Deep blue with black accents, sleek and rounded.

spatial_relations: The black throat is positioned below the blue head.
The white belly is located beneath the black throat.
The deep blue wings extend from the sides of the body.
